title: Complete checkout and reach success
description: A shopper can fill all required checkout fields, submit the order, and reach the success confirmation page.

steps.description: Add a product to the cart
Fill in the delivery address field
Verify the success confirmation page is displayed

title: Add a product from the homepage and view it in cart
description: A shopper can add a product from the homepage and confirm it appears in the cart.

steps.description: Add a product to the cart
Verify the added item is displayed in the cart

title: Browse homepage products by category
description: A shopper can filter the homepage product list by category and see the displayed products update accordingly.

steps.description: Verify the product list updates to show the selected category

title: Increase cart quantity and update totals
description: A shopper can increase an item quantity in the cart and see the cart totals update.

steps.description: Add a product to the cart

title: Search the homepage catalog
description: A shopper can use the homepage search or filter controls to narrow the product list and see matching results.

steps.description: Use the search or filter control to narrow the product list
Verify the product list is refined to matching products

title: Keep cart items while moving between browsing and cart
description: A shopper can move between the homepage and cart without losing the added item or its total.

steps.description: Add a product to the cart
Verify the added item is still displayed in the cart
Verify the cart total is preserved

title: Decrease cart quantity and update totals
description: A shopper can decrease an item quantity in the cart and see the cart totals update.

steps.description: Add a product to the cart

title: Remove an item from the cart
description: A shopper can remove an item from the cart and see the cart reflect the removal.

steps.description: Add a product to the cart
Remove the item from the cart
Verify the item is no longer displayed in the cart

title: Explore the shop catalog
description: A visitor can open the shop page and browse available products and details.

steps.description: Verify the product catalog is displayed

title: Show validation when required checkout fields are missing
description: A shopper can try to submit checkout with missing required fields and see inline validation without completing the order.

steps.description: Submit the order form without filling required fields
Verify validation feedback is visible for the missing fields
Verify the success confirmation page is not displayed

title: Reject invalid checkout phone number
description: A shopper can enter an invalid phone number at checkout and see phone validation before the order is submitted.

steps.description: Fill in an invalid phone number in the phone field
Fill in the delivery address field
Verify phone validation feedback is visible
Verify the success confirmation page is not displayed

title: Allow authenticated admin access to the dashboard
description: An authenticated admin can open the admin route and see the dashboard content.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed

title: Display stored phone number formatting
description: A shopper can view the stored phone number on checkout and confirm it is shown in the expected bracketed format.

steps.description: Verify the stored phone number display is visible
Verify the phone number is shown between brackets
